MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING:

PETITIONER WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s Notice Of Hearing On Petition For And Order Confirming Arbitration Award And For Entry Of Judgment is denied for failure to comply with CCP 1290.4(b). (301/DM) Reporter: Rhonda Fung, CSR: 4819
